<!--
Before filing a feature request:
- Search existing issues to avoid duplicates
- Check the roadmap to see if it's already planned
- For significant features, please discuss before implementing
-->

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Why is this important to you? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to see happen? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why didn't they work? -->

## Use case

<!-- Concrete example of how you would use this feature. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else: screenshots, links, prior art from other operators, etc. -->
